source-discipline.reason: Every gap claim (G1-G6) is verified against code or doctrine at HEAD with file:line evidence: G2 at schemas/directness.py:225 (pop_full treats None as EXACT; evidence_population_match 27/640), G3 at directness.py:80 (co1 -> GRAIN_SPECIFIC wholesale), G6 at directness.py:82 vs evidence-methodology.md §1.6, G1 at evidence-methodology.md §2.3 vs tier-system.md §3 vs directness.py NON-ANCHORING. The mode x stratum matrix was regenerated by running scale_directness() over all grain x scale combinations and diffed against the doc table (10/10 match incl. generalizes-beyond-measured). Pilot verification (determinism, validator, mutation suites) is logged with commands and outcomes in working/pilot/PILOT-MANIFEST.md §7.

bias_direction: Self-serving exposure: this DR proposes adopting a document the same session authored, and the session graded its own pilot as passing. Bounded three ways: (1) every item is PROPOSED and owner-gated - nothing takes effect without explicit ratification; (2) the pilot's checks were mutation-tested (each gate shown firing on injected bad data before its pass counted), so 'passing' is not self-assessed prose but reproducible commands; (3) an independent adversarial-review agent with an explicit attack brief (citation fidelity, invariant bypass, engine correctness, GRADE fidelity, CRPD/ethics) runs against the committed change-set and its surviving findings must land as a v2 revision before ratification is requested as final.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer might argue the G1-G6 'gaps' manufacture work by construing edge-cases as defects, and that the register map over-mechanizes editorial judgment. Response: G2/G3/G6 are behavioral facts of the committed code demonstrable in a REPL, not interpretations; G1 is a contradiction between two canonical texts that the state machine makes reachable; the register map constrains only claim-strength language, leaving emphasis and framing free, and I3's strictness already caught a real defect in this session's own first draft - evidence the mechanization binds its author, not just future writers.
